creator: vedran@miletic.net
text:
FWIW, df outputs numbers without decimals. When decimals (and units) are used (e.g. df -h), df will also (reasonably) use strings instead of numbers.

Finally, one should be careful with decimal values since the decimal separator is locale-dependant and can cause libxo to produce invalid JSON (I observed this on w(1) and Croatian locale, bug 276304).
